overview: Legacy MD is a medical aesthetics and longevity medicine clinic in Miami offering comprehensive health optimization through six proprietary protocols addressing facial refinement, metabolic design, hormone replacement, IV therapy, preventive care, and sexual health.
highlights: Six proprietary protocols for biological optimization (Bioarchitecture, Body Architecture, Performance Command, Longevity Engine, Medical Concierge, Male Sexual Health)
Concierge model with direct access and travel medicine
IV therapy and cellular nutrition including NAD+ infusions
targetAudience: Individuals seeking comprehensive health optimization, longevity strategies, and performance enhancement through personalized medical care.
